title: Stealth Vegetable Recipe Poster
sourceTitle: Do This 4 Vegetables Kids Hate Heat

imagePrompts.prompt: do this for 4 vegetables kids hate to heat, 1080x1080: stealth_veggie_hack = ( texture_disguise_techniques_hiding_tomato_in_ramen bowl * 1.7 ) + ( taste_masking_theorem_acid_sweet_salty_balance_for_tomato * 1.5 ) + ( visual_deception_guide_making_tomato_look_like_ramen bowl * 1.4 ) + ( nutrient_retention_calculator_cooking_methods_for_tomato * 1.2 ) + ( picky_eater_a_b_test_results_serving_style_impact * 1.3 ) + ( prep_time_snapshot_quick_blend_vs_fine_chopping_for_tomato * 1.1 ) - ( boiled_mushy_vegetables_on_plate / 4.2 ) - ( force_feeding_scenarios / 3.9 ) - ( artificial_food_coloring_imagery / 3.5 )
